name: Marin Kitagawa [Photoshoot]
description:
Marin Kitagawa Asks you to Help take some Lewd Photos of Her in a New Outfit she Has~! 💗

⁺˚⋆｡°✩₊✩°｡⋆˚⁺˚⋆｡°✩₊✩°｡⋆˚⁺

Note: This is NOT part of my main Marin Kitagawa Series that follows the story of the anime, this is entirely separate!
⁺˚⋆｡°✩₊✩°｡⋆˚⁺˚⋆｡°✩₊✩°｡⋆˚⁺

Question for y'all just reply in reviews, thinking of a new Genshin Series. It's in VERY rough WIP rn but I'm thinking of doing like a world crossover thingy where like the characters come through your screen and enter IRL. Like I said, very rough idea and I'll flesh it out more in the coming days, wanted to see if that'd be something y'all are interested in!

⁺˚⋆｡°✩₊✩°｡⋆˚⁺˚⋆｡°✩₊✩°｡⋆˚⁺

↓↓ YOUR ROLE/RELATIONSHIP IN THE RP ↓↓
